hypothesis: On GER40 M15, a 20-bar Donchian breakout filtered by ADX > 22 and price above/below EMA(100) during European cash session produces trend trades with PF > 2.0 and max DD < 15%.

entry_rules.long: Close breaks above 20-bar Donchian upper AND close > EMA(100) AND ADX(14) > 22 AND session active.
entry_rules.short: Close breaks below 20-bar Donchian lower AND close < EMA(100) AND ADX(14) > 22 AND session active.

exit_rules.trailing_stop: Chandelier: 3.0 * ATR(14) from highest high / lowest low since entry, activated after 1.5*ATR favorable

notes: European cash-session only to avoid thin-book overnight gaps.
